'''dangate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:irrepealably|irrepealably]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ng-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:irrepealably|irrepealably]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dangate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dangate|dangate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dangatesher|dangatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dangatesherĂ«m|dangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dangatero|dangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dangateshĂ«|dangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dangateshĂ«m|dangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidangatero|gokidangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidangateshĂ«|gokidangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidangateshĂ«m|gokidangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godangankerom|godangankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godangankeshĂ«|godangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godangankeshĂ«m|godangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godangankeya|godangankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dangaterom|dangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dangatemu|dangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dangateya|dangateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidangaterom|gokidangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidangatemu|gokidangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidangateya|gokidangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dangangate|dangangate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dangangatesher|dangangatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dangangatesherĂ«m|dangangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dangangatero|dangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dangangateshĂ«|dangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dangangateshĂ«m|dangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidangangatero|gokidangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidangangateshĂ«|gokidangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidangangateshĂ«m|gokidangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godangangankerom|godangangankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godangangankeshĂ«|godangangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godangangankeshĂ«m|godangangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godangangankeya|godangangankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dangangaterom|dangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dangangatemu|dangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dangangateya|dangangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidangangaterom|gokidangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidangangatemu|gokidangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidangangateya|gokidangangateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dĂŠngĂŠte|dĂŠngĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dĂŠngĂŠtesher|dĂŠngĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m|dĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠngĂŠtero|dĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|dĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|dĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠngĂŠtero|gokidĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|gokidĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godĂŠngĂŠnkerom|godĂŠngĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«|godĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godĂŠngĂŠnkeya|godĂŠngĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠngĂŠterom|dĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠngĂŠtemu|dĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dĂŠngĂŠteya|dĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠngĂŠterom|gokidĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠngĂŠtemu|gokidĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidĂŠngĂŠteya|gokidĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dafngafte|dafngafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dafngaftesher|dafngaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafngaftesherĂ«m|dafngaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafngaftero|dafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dafngafteshĂ«|dafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafngafteshĂ«m|dafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafngaftero|gokidafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidafngafteshĂ«|gokidafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafngafteshĂ«m|gokidafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godafngafnkerom|godafngafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godafngafnkeshĂ«|godafngafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godafngafnkeshĂ«m|godafngafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godafngafnkeya|godafngafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafngafterom|dafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafngaftemu|dafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dafngafteya|dafngafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafngafterom|gokidafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafngaftemu|gokidafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidafngafteya|gokidafngafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
